subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — I'd be happy to explore a collaboration between our teams.

I'm available for a call on the following dates and times:
  • Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00
  • Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00
  • Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding internal contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those. If you'd like to involve them directly, the best path is to continue through this channel and we can arrange accordingly.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
